nodes.label: Tests for Slack Block Kit approval buttons and thread context fetching.
Wire up the minimal mocks required to import SlackAdapter.
Create a SlackAdapter instance with mocked internals.
Test the send_exec_approval method sends Block Kit buttons.
Test the approval button click handler.
Self-bot child replies are skipped to avoid circular context,         but non-se
The thread parent posted by a bot (e.g. a cron summary) must be         included
Parent (non-self bot) is kept, self-bot child replies are dropped,         user
Self-bot filtering must use the per-workspace bot user id so a         self-bot
Regression guard: the message whose ts == current_ts must never         appear i
_fetch_thread_parent_text should reuse the thread-context cache         when it
Verify the fix uses build_session_key instead of manual key construction.
Bot's sent messages are tracked so thread replies work without @mention.
Verify memory is bounded when many messages are sent.
When bot is @mentioned in a thread, that thread is tracked.
